scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npx prisma generate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && npx esbuild src/entrypoints/auth.ts src/entrypoints/checkout.ts src/entrypoints/events.ts src/entrypoints/core.ts src/entrypoints/edge.ts src/entrypoints/profissional-hono.ts src/entrypoints/public-hono.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node20 --outdir=../api --external:multer --external:nodemailer --external:sharp --external:googleapis --external:pg-native --external:@prisma/client --external:.prisma/client --external:@sentry/node --external:pdfkit --external:web-push --external:exifr --external:archiver && cd .. && npm run build --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('public')) fs.rmSync('public', {recursive:true,force:true}); fs.renameSync('frontend/dist', 'public')"
scripts.vercel-build: npx prisma generate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('public')) fs.rmSync('public', {recursive:true,force:true}); fs.renameSync('frontend/dist', 'public')"
